name: @aibender/testkit
description: Synthesized fixture generators + fake servers for tests (plan §9.5). Fixtures are ALWAYS synthesized, never copied from real transcripts [X2]. M1 surface: JSONL line generator, transcript-tail fixtures + FakeQueryRunner (ICR-0001), gateway FakeKernel (ICR-0002), golden WS-protocol fixture corpus (ICR-0003).
